LanguageData.Bullet_NCLChargeLance.label: NCL Charge Lance Round
LanguageData.NCLLance.label: NCL Charge Lance
LanguageData.NCLLance.description:
Weapon Archive: NCL Charge Lance Designation: NCL Charge Lance Affiliation: Neo-Communist League "Iron Law" Standard Weapons Series
Functional Overview: Specialized rifle designed for Dinergate units, featuring exceptional single-shot damage, armor penetration, and accuracy. Optimized for Dinergate close-quarters combat with rapid-fire modes and integrated bayonet functionality, enabling seamless transitions between medium-range suppression and melee tactics.
LanguageData.NCLLance.tools.stock.label: stock
LanguageData.NCLLance.tools.barrel.label: barrel
LanguageData.NCLLance.verbs.Verb_Shoot.label: NCL Charge Lance
